name: Race Condition Enabling Link Following
description: The product checks a file's status and then accesses it, creating a race condition window where an attacker can replace the file with a symbolic link between the check and the use, redirecting access to an unintended target.
detection_pattern: CONTROL node performs file status check followed by a separate STORAGE or INGRESS node accessing the same file path, without atomic check-and-use operation, allowing TOCTOU window for symlink substitution
